query:
CREATE TABLE `supplierRateCardItems` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`rateCardId` int NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`categoryLabel` varchar(256),
	`planName` varchar(256),
	`itemType` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`priceExGst` decimal(12,4),
	`unit` varchar(64),
	`inclusionGB` decimal(12,3),
	`inclusionMinutes` int,
	`inclusionSMS` int,
	`overageRatePerGB` decimal(10,6),
	`overageRatePerMinute` decimal(10,6),
	`overageRatePerSMS` decimal(10,6),
	`monthlyAccessFee` decimal(10,4),
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `supplierRateCardItems_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `supplierRateCards` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`supplier` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`rateCardName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`effectiveDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`currency` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'AUD',
	`taxStatus` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'excl_gst',
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `supplierRateCards_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`monthlyAccessFee` decimal(10,4),
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `supplierRateCardItems_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)

CREATE TABLE `supplierRateCards` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`supplier` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`rateCardName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`effectiveDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`currency` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'AUD',
	`taxStatus` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'excl_gst',
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `supplierRateCards_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
